## Investment

### Phase 2 Development

**$[AMOUNT]** — All capabilities listed above included. Ongoing maintenance, hosting, and support covered under the existing $[MONTHLY_AMOUNT]/month agreement.

### AI Processing Costs (Pass-Through)

The AI services that power extraction and analysis have a usage cost. This is the actual cost from the provider — no markup.

| Cost                   | When                               | Estimate               |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------------- | ---------------------- |
| Build-time API usage   | During development (one-time)      | $[LOW] – $[HIGH]       |
| Usage-based processing | After go-live (scales with volume) | $[LOW] – $[HIGH]/month |

[Client] selects the AI provider that meets your compliance requirements (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, or any compatible provider). The platform is model-agnostic — switching providers requires zero code changes.
